languages.text: "У меня ушло пятьдесят лет на то, чтобы понять — Нунциус был обречен как только коснулся артефакта. Все мои поиски спасительной панацеи были не ради него — я делал это ради себя. Я не мог его отпустить и вместо этого убаюкивал совесть лживыми поисками — все, лишь бы избавиться от боли душевной, игнорируя вполне реальные терзания того, кого сам и обрек. Мне пора научиться прощаться". {n}Губы Эоганна трогает печальная улыбка.{/n} "Это — неопровержимый факт".

"It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."

Мне пора научиться прощаться". {n}Губы Эоганна трогает печальная улыбка.{/n} "Это — неопровержимый факт".

languages.text: «Tardé cincuenta años en comprender que Nuncius había sellado su destino nada más tocar ese artefacto. Mi empeño por hallar un remedio no fue por su bien, sino por el mío. No quería dejarlo morir, así que opté por emprender una falsa búsqueda con tal de convencerme a mí mismo, de aliviar la pena de mi alma, mientras ignoraba el verdadero calvario que padecía aquél a quien había abandonado. Ya es hora de despedirme». {n}Los labios de Eogunn esbozan una sonrisa triste.{/n} «Eso es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."

Ya es hora de despedirme». {n}Los labios de Eogunn esbozan una sonrisa triste.{/n} «Eso es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: “我花了五十年才明白，在努恩修斯触碰那件造物的那一刻起，便已注定毁灭。我寻遍灵丹妙药，不是为了他，而是为了我自己。我放不下他，于是麻痹自己的良知投入一场虚假的追寻，只为了摆脱这灵魂上的痛苦，却一直漠视被我抛弃之人所承受的真真切切的折磨。我该学会告别了。”{n}伊奥贡的嘴角泛起一丝苦笑。{/n}“这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “我花了五十年才明白，在努恩修斯触碰那件造物的那一刻起，便已注定毁灭。我寻遍灵丹妙药，不是为了他，而是为了我自己。我放不下他，于是麻痹自己的良知投入一场虚假的追寻，只为了摆脱这灵魂上的痛苦，却一直漠视被我抛弃之人所承受的真真切切的折磨。我该学会告别了。”{n}伊奥贡的嘴角泛起一丝苦笑。{/n}“这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: « Il m'aura fallu cinquante ans pour comprendre que Nuncius était condamné dès l'instant où il a touché cet artefact. Ce n'était pas pour lui que je m'obstinais à chercher une solution, mais pour moi. Incapable de le laisser partir, je me suis donné cette quête illusoire afin de soulager ma conscience. J'étais prêt à tout pour apaiser la douleur qui étreignait mon âme, même si cela revenait à ignorer la souffrance bien réelle de la personne que j'avais abandonnée. Il est temps que j'apprenne à dire au revoir. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable, » {n}ajoute-t-il en esquissant un sourire triste.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."

Il est temps que j'apprenne à dire au revoir. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable, » {n}ajoute-t-il en esquissant un sourire triste.{/n}

languages.text: "Nuncius'un o esere dokunduğu an mahkûm olduğunu anlamam elli yılımı aldı. Tüm o derde deva arayışım onun iyiliği için değil, kendim içindi. Onu bırakamıyordum, bu yüzden de vicdanımı sahte bir vazifeyle uyutmayı seçtim. Terk ettiğim kişinin gerçekte çektiği acıyı görmezden gelirken ruhumu bu acıdan kurtarmak için her şeyi yaptım. Veda etmeyi öğrenmemin zamanı geldi." {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarında hüzünlü bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Su götürmez bir gerçek bu."
languages.original_text: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'un o esere dokunduğu an mahkûm olduğunu anlamam elli yılımı aldı. Tüm o derde deva arayışım onun iyiliği için değil, kendim içindi. Onu bırakamıyordum, bu yüzden de vicdanımı sahte bir vazifeyle uyutmayı seçtim. Terk ettiğim kişinin gerçekte çektiği acıyı görmezden gelirken ruhumu bu acıdan kurtarmak için her şeyi yaptım. Veda etmeyi öğrenmemin zamanı geldi." {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarında hüzünlü bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Su götürmez bir gerçek bu."

languages.text: "Ich habe fünfzig Jahre gebraucht, um zu verstehen, dass Nuncius in dem Moment verloren war, als er das Artefakt berührte. Ich habe nicht für ihn nach einem Wundermittel gesucht, sondern für mich. Ich konnte ihn nicht gehen lassen, also lullte ich mein Gewissen mit einer falschen Suche ein ... alles, um meine Seele von diesem Schmerz zu befreien, während ich das reale Leiden der Person ignorierte, die ich im Stich gelassen hatte. Ich musste erst lernen, Abschied zu nehmen." {n}Ein trauriges Lächeln umspielt Eogunns Lippen.{/n} "Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."

Ich musste erst lernen, Abschied zu nehmen." {n}Ein trauriges Lächeln umspielt Eogunns Lippen.{/n} "Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: 「五十年かけて、私はようやく理解しました。ヌンキウスはあの遺物に触れた瞬間から、もう助からない運命だったのだと。私が万能薬を探し求めたすべては、彼のためではなく、私自身のためだったのです。私は彼を手放すことができず、その代わりに、偽りの探求で自らの良心をなだめていた――この魂の痛みを拭い去るためなら何でもしながら、その一方で、私が見捨てた者の、まぎれもなく現実の苦しみから目を背け続けていたのです。今こそ、別れを告げることを学ぶべき時です」{n}悲しげな笑みが、エオガンの唇に浮かぶ。{/n}「これは議論の余地のない事実です」
languages.original_text: "It took me fifty years to understand that Nuncius was doomed as soon as he touched that artefact. All my searching for a panacea was not for his sake, but for mine. I could not let him go, so instead I lulled my conscience into a false quest — anything to rid my soul of this pain, all the while ignoring the very real suffering of the person I had forsaken. It is time I learned to say goodbye." {n}A sad smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n} "That is an incontrovertible fact."
